programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 33
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.title: Sealed With A Kiss - EP 14 / 吻我吧住家男
programme.desc: Glib-tongued property agent accidentally kisses jinxed man and suddenly, their fortunes change! She loses her ability to tell even the mildest of white lies (bad news) whereas he suddenly becomes lucky! Now How can she scheme to get her kiss and ability to be eloquence back?

programme.title: Little NeZha - Hero of Heaven and Earth - EP 1 / 少年英雄小哪吒
programme.desc: It tells the story of Nezha growing through learning both the civil and martial arts, punishing evil and promoting good, enrich the populace, and keep the world in his heart. Through overcoming one ordeal after another, he becomes a young hero, embodying the cultural spirit of Nezha: justice and courage, perseverance, and loyalty, filial piety, benevolence, and righteousness.

programme.title: Little NeZha - Hero of Heaven and Earth - EP 2 / 少年英雄小哪吒
programme.desc: It tells the story of Nezha growing through learning both the civil and martial arts, punishing evil and promoting good, enrich the populace, and keep the world in his heart. programme.title: New Doraemon - EP 47 / 哆啦A梦
programme.desc: This animation series centres on a robotic cat from the future, Doraemon. With its various magical gadgets, Doraemon helps its master solve all kinds of problems.

programme.title: Word Whiz Mandarin S5 - EP 13 / 华文"浆"好玩
programme.desc: Word Whiz (Mandarin) is back for its 5th season! Brave young challengers who venture into Dr Jiang Yijiang’s Slime Lab will have their proficiency in the Chinese language put to the ultimate test — or risk becoming her loyal minions at her every command! To break free, they must crack every puzzle and outsmart Dr Jiang at her own game. Will they escape or get slimed?

programme.title: Team Curious S3 - EP 63 / 奇趣特工队 S3
programme.desc: Quincy is a boy full of curiosity and a sense of justice. He also has a mysterious identity - the captain of Q-team. The team comprises of Quincy and his companions: his mischievous and proud Blitz Cat who understands Alien languages, the polite and gentle Robot Al, and Princess Deirdre, an alien visitor who accidentally lands on Earth. Quincy and his partners all have magical badges, which allow

programme.title: Tuesday Report : Stay By Your Side - EP 4 / 星期二特写 陪在你身边
programme.desc: During COVID-19 pandemic, Michael Sim led volunteers to provide rough sleepers with food and care, a commitment that continues. In Bedok Reservoir Road estate, Sandy Goh organized volunteers to distribute free vegetables and daily necessities, strengthening community ties. For years, Cheng Hong Welfare Service Society has stayed by the elderly, accompanying them through their final stages of life.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware’s No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 299
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear.

programme.desc: "Health 2.0" teaches simple, easy steps for a healthy life. Each episode features a team of doctors, family physicians, rehab specialists, and nutritionists working with you to protect your family’s health.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 252
programme.desc: Nature's Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2 krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 306
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 287
programme.desc: A natural, drug-free remedy that uses Far Infrared (FIR) technology and acupoint stimulation to relieve cough, throat irritation, and phlegm — improving circulation and easing discomfort from colds, flu, or post-viral irritation. Designed for safe, non-invasive use, it offers lasting comfort for up to 6 hours, supporting easier breathing and uninterrupted rest, day or night.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 291

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 244

programme.title: AI Got Me - EP 1 / 遇见AI
programme.desc: Education is a primary frontier for the AI wave. While debates persist over the ethical boundaries of student-AI collaboration and teacher acceptance, AI is proving its worth in skill-based training. From refining strokes of National Swimmers to formulating basketball tactics for coaches, its reach is vast. The key lies in treating AI as a powerful assistant rather than the lead.

programme.title: 7 Days, I Can Do It! - EP 1 / 7天我可以
programme.desc: Is it possible to learn a sport in just 7 days? In the series "7 Days, I Can Do It!", news anchors will visit local athletes and challenge themselves to train in various sports for a week. Their goal is to push their physical limits and complete the challenges set by these athletes.

programme.title: Wild Kratts S7 - EP 17
programme.desc: In each episode, Chris and Martin Kratt travel to a different corner of the world to meet amazing new animals. Join the Wild Kratts for a laugh-out-loud comedy adventure, as Martin and Chris activate their Creature Power Suits to rescue their animal friends!

programme.title: Pfffirates - EP 9
programme.desc: On Calypso Island, three crews are taught Pfffiracy by the legendary Captain Lamar. This tough training program ranges from sailing exercises and treasure hunting competitions to cannon firing and accosting enemy ships! But it would take more than that for Pat, Lily or Stede to give up. When a Pfffirate has friends to count on, nothing is impossible!

programme.title: Agents Of Sprawl - EP 2
programme.desc: Things are going very wrong in both Sprawl and the real world. Zayd's teammates are under mind control and they're trying to capture Norman. To defeat the virus controlling them, Zayd has to team up with the all-round expert gamer, Meiling, to help. But uh oh, Meiling thinks it's all just a joke!

programme.title: Jade Armor S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Join Lan Jun, the unlikely Chinese teen hero who inherits a magical suit of armor, and her Beasticon talking animal friends, as they continue to defend their city of Ban Tang, against the Crimson Lord and Black Tiger!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug & Cat Noir S4 - EP 26
programme.desc: The continuing adventures of Marinette and Adrien, two normal teens, transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir when evil threatens their city!

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. King the silly enthusiastic duckling, Wombat the fluffy book-loving wombat, and Chumpkins the "genius" inventor pig, and their computer assistant Zeusy. For the Adventure Buds, life is all about making every day crazy fun - taking any idea or activity and making it an awesome adventure!

programme.title: Miniforce Animaltron S4 - EP 7

programme.desc: Marco Polo is about to return home to Venice when he discovers that his friend Shi La is not an orphan! To find her long-lost mother, Marco, Shi La, and Luigi set out on an adventurous journey across new countries!

programme.title: Game On - EP 4
programme.desc: A national netball player known for her speed, agility, and teamwork steps into the world of fencing---guided by a fencer half her age. With years of perfecting her footwork and precision on the court, she now faces a new challenge: mastering the art of swordplay.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27 - EP 2
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 1
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall - EP 4
programme.desc: Whale with Steve Backshall gives a stunning and comprehensive overview of the world of whales, dolphins and porpoises. Adventurer and conservationist Steve Backshall travels from the Azores to the Arctic, capturing breathtaking underwater footage in each unique habitat.

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War (2018), the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Evolution Earth - EP 3
programme.desc: EVOLUTION EARTH embarks on a global expedition to reveal the extraordinary ways animals are keeping pace with a planet that is changing at superspeed. We meet the scientists, filmmakers and local communities at the front lines of this rapid change. They show that we too can help, and that if we work with nature in planned conservation efforts, nature can do more than survive - it can bounce back.

programme.title: How to be a Latin Lover
programme.desc: Finding himself dumped after twenty-five years of marriage, a man who made a career of seducing rich older women must move in with his estranged sister, where he begins to learn the value of family.

programme.title: Just For Laughs S25 - EP 8
programme.desc: Just For Laughswill tickle everyone's funny bone with its hilarious practical jokes, hidden camera pranks, and other creative hijinks.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah's new menu.

programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2

programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. programme.title: Kenalin Mas Serabutan Pengendali Hati
